name: trace-agent-mcp
description: Access Unreal Insights .utrace files through a local MCP server backed by TraceAgentCli.

interface.shortDescription: Query Unreal Insights trace files from Codex
interface.longDescription: A repo-local MCP wrapper around TraceAgentCli for listing tracks and querying timing events, frames, counters, and bookmarks from .utrace files.
defaultPrompt: Open a .utrace file and list its tracks
Find a track by name and query its events
Inspect frame tracks, counters, and bookmarks in a trace
